PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -in 5000,5001,5173 -or \($_.LocalPort -ge 5000 -and $_.LocalPort -lt 5200\) } | Select-Object LocalAddress, LocalPort, OwningProcess, @{N='ProcessName';E={\(Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).ProcessName}} | Format-Table -AutoSize)

Bash(bash -c 'for i in {1..30}; do sleep 1; tail -1 /tmp/backend.log 2>/dev/null | grep -E "Now listening|ready" && echo "[BACKEND READY]" && break; done; for i in {1..30}; do sleep 1; tail -1 /tmp/frontend.log 2>/dev/null | grep -E "ready|Local" && echo "[FRONTEND READY]" && break; done')
PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "devenv|rider|code|omnisharp|msbuild|vshost|dotnet" } | Select-Object Id, Name | Sort-Object Name)

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { Write-Host "Vite running on 5173, PID: $\($conn.OwningProcess\)" } else { Write-Host "Vite NOT running" })

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $conns | ForEach-Object { Write-Output \("PID=" + $_.OwningProcess + " Addr=" + $_.LocalAddress\) }; $pids = $conns.OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique; foreach \($processId in $pids\) { Stop-Process -Id $processId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output \("Killed PID " + $processId\) } } else { Write-Output "Nothing on 5000" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 10; $b = Test-NetConnection -ComputerName localhost -Port 5000 -WarningAction SilentlyContinue; $f = Test-NetConnection -ComputerName localhost -Port 5173 -WarningAction SilentlyContinue; "Backend \(5000\): $\($b.TcpTestSucceeded\)"; "Frontend \(5173\): $\($f.TcpTestSucceeded\)")

PowerShell($start = Get-Date; do { Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/healthz/live" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 2 -ErrorAction Stop; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { Write-Output "Backend ready"; break } } catch {} } until \(\(Get-Date\) -gt $start.AddSeconds\(60\)\))

PowerShell($start = Get-Date; do { Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 2 -ErrorAction Stop; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { Write-Output "Vite ready on :5173"; break } } catch {} } until \(\(Get-Date\) -gt $start.AddSeconds\(30\)\))

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000,5173 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Start-Process -FilePath "dotnet" -ArgumentList "run","--project","src/NodePilot.Api","--urls","http://localhost:5000" -WorkingDirectory "e:\\NodePilot" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Process -FilePath "cmd.exe" -ArgumentList "/c","npm run dev" -WorkingDirectory "e:\\NodePilot\\src\\nodepilot-ui" -WindowStyle Hidden)

PowerShell($s = Get-Date; do { Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { if \(\(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/healthz/live" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 2\).StatusCode -eq 200\) { Write-Output "Backend ready"; break } } catch {} } until \(\(Get-Date\) -gt $s.AddSeconds\(70\)\))

PowerShell($s = Get-Date; do { Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { if \(\(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 2\).StatusCode -eq 200\) { Write-Output "Vite ready"; break } } catch {} } until \(\(Get-Date\) -gt $s.AddSeconds\(30\)\))

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Host "Stopped")

PowerShell($deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(30\); do { Start-Sleep 2; $ok = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) -and \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) } until \($ok -or \(Get-Date\) -gt $deadline\); if \($ok\) { Write-Host "Both ports up" } else { Write-Host "Timeout" })

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); def_json=json.loads\(d.get\('definitionJson','{}'\) or '{}'\); nodes=def_json.get\('nodes',[]\); [print\(json.dumps\(n, indent=2\)\) for n in nodes if 'delay' in n.get\('data',{}\).get\('activityType',''\)]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); def_json=json.loads\(d.get\('definitionJson','{}'\) or '{}'\); nodes=def_json.get\('nodes',[]\); [print\(json.dumps\(n['data'], indent=2\)\) for n in nodes if 'delay' in n.get\('data',{}\).get\('activityType',''\)]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); def_json=json.loads\(d.get\('definitionJson','{}'\) or '{}'\); nodes=def_json.get\('nodes',[]\); [print\('Delay config:', n['data'].get\('config'\)\) for n in nodes if 'delay' in n.get\('data',{}\).get\('activityType',''\)]")
Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('/tmp/wf.json'\)\); print\('Name:', d.get\('name'\)\); print\('Keys:', list\(d.keys\(\)\)[:8]\)")
Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('C:/temp/wf.json'\)\); print\('Name:', d.get\('name'\)\); print\('Keys:', list\(d.keys\(\)\)[:8]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('userId:', d.get\('userId'\)\); print\('role:', d.get\('role'\)\)")

PowerShell($p = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { "dev server LISTENING on 5173 \(PID $\($p.OwningProcess | Select-Object -First 1\)\)" } else { "no dev server on 5173" }; $api = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($api\) { "api LISTENING on 5000" } else { "no api on 5000" })

PowerShell($errs=$null; $toks=$null; [void][System.Management.Automation.Language.Parser]::ParseFile\('e:\\NodePilot\\scripts\\seed-custom-alert-rules.ps1',[ref]$toks,[ref]$errs\); if\($errs\){ $errs | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "PARSE ERROR: $\($_.Message\) @ $\($_.Extent.StartLineNumber\)" } } else { Write-Host "OK: parses cleanly, $\($toks.Count\) tokens" })

PowerShell(Get-Process pwsh,powershell -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id,ProcessName,StartTime,@{N='RunMin';E={[math]::Round\(\(\(Get-Date\)-$_.StartTime\).TotalMinutes,1\)}},@{N='CPU_s';E={[math]::Round\($_.CPU,1\)}} | Sort-Object StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize)
